gateway/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.x to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
gateway/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with Spring Framework 6 APIs required for modern JDK features.

gateway/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to align with the target JDK.
gateway/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and targets Java 21 for optimal performance and feature support; keeping 17 may cause warnings or suboptimal bytecode generation.
